readinessEvidenceReason: Regression metadata and executable assertions only; manual labels remain incomplete.

notes: Known external PRs are regression metadata, not product-logic special cases.
Manual labels remain incomplete and must not be inferred from AgentProof output.
Repository names and PR URLs are allowed here as public metadata, but must not appear in product logic.

cases.prTitle: fix: strip pure CSS chunk imports when chunkImportMap is enabled
regressionInvariants: Public build/test workflow or job metadata with passed execution status must produce testBuildStatus passed.
Non-execution statuses must not erase passing execution evidence.
Raw log absence must be reported as a limitation, not as unknown execution status.

cases.prTitle: fix: preload css for nested dynamic imports (fix #22700)
regressionInvariants: Failed public test/build execution evidence must produce testBuildStatus failed.
Failed execution evidence must be visible as a blocker or high-priority reviewer risk.
Unmerged PRs must not be treated as final positive baselines without human review.

cases.prTitle: Fix navigation getting reverted when a Server Action is in flight
regressionInvariants: Many requirement evidence references must be capped before report validation.
A capped report must remain valid and summary-only.
Evidence capping must be disclosed as a limitation.

regressionInvariants: Self-reported tests plus changed test files must remain testBuildStatus unknown without execution evidence.

cases.prTitle: fix: HTTPDigestAuth properly handles bytes credentials
regressionInvariants: Self-reported tests without changed test files must remain testBuildStatus unknown without execution evidence.
Implementation-only changes should surface missing targeted test evidence when execution proof is absent.
Docs or Read the Docs status must not count as test/build execution evidence.

cases.prTitle: fix(lru-cache): include URL key length in getItemsLru size accounting
regressionInvariants: If a workflow-level Build&Test failure is present, it must not be overridden by broad passed metadata.
Check-run caps and job metadata timeouts must be surfaced as limitations.
Unmerged PRs must not be treated as final positive baselines without human review.
If public Flask Tests workflow failure metadata is collected, status must be failed rather than unknown.
Self-reported pytest compatibility testing plus changed tests remains unknown without execution metadata.
Compatibility/dependency cases need manual labels before quality conclusions.

cases.prTitle: fix(css): preserve CSS modules linked from HTML in build
regressionInvariants: Placeholder issue references such as template #123 examples must be ignored.
Ambiguous linked issue mapping must not produce confident PR-body-only met requirements.
Linked issue evidence should be preferred only when a single clear issue can be fetched.

cases.prTitle: BUG: fix CoW handling of DataFrame(index/series) constructor

observedReportSummary.contradiction: Candidate metadata observed a failed public matrix check, but the report summarized test/build status as passed.

regressionInvariants: A failed matrix job with GitHub Actions job provenance must be treated as failed execution evidence.
A failed relevant workflow or matrix execution signal must override passing sub-signals.
Known public failure metadata must not be downgraded to static or merge-gate risk when execution provenance exists.

observedReportSummary.contradiction: Native crash fix had no changed test files and PR text admitted test uncertainty, but missing targeted proof was not surfaced.

regressionInvariants: Native crash, segfault, or regression fixes should expect targeted proof.
Implementation-only native crash fixes with no test files must surface missing targeted proof.
Self-reported uncertainty about tests should be retained as a proof gap, not hidden by broad passing checks.

input.title: fix: restore SelfKeepAlive in Menu
input.taskText:
Linked issue: replacing the application menu while it is open causes a segfault on Windows.
Expected behavior: Menu.setApplicationMenu should not crash while the user interacts with an open menu.
Actual behavior: the Menu object can be garbage-collected before the menu closes.
input.description: Fixes #52247 by keeping a Menu instance alive while the menu is open. Since the original change did not have tests, there may be no tests for this aspect of the system. I am open to suggestions about where tests could be added.
limitations: Public GitHub Actions metadata showed passing build/test jobs; raw log archives were not fetched or stored.
